title: aconitum kitadakense f. lasiocarpum
intro: Aconitum kitadakense f. lasiocarpum is a variety of the Aconitum kitadakense plant, belonging to the Aconitum genus of flowering plants. This plant contains aconitine, a toxic alkaloid with medicinal properties, traditionally used in Eastern herbal medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Aconitum kitadakense f. lasiocarpum include pain relief, reduced fever, and improved digestion, as well as its potential to combat certain types of infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in combination with other medicinal herbs, typically in the form of tinctures, infusions, or powders, although caution is advised due to its toxicity.
